mapper.select: SELECT R.RSV_IDX, R.MEET_GUBUN, TO_CHAR(R.RSV_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RSV_DATE, R.SRT_TIME, R.END_TIME, R.EMPNO, R.TITLE, R.CONTENTS, R.ATTACH_FILE_SEQ, R.AREA_CODE, TO_CHAR(R.REGI_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REGI_DATE, R.INWRITER_ID, TO_CHAR(R.UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS UPDATE_DATE, R.UPWRITER_ID, E.NAME AS INWRITER_NAME FROM MEETROM_RSV R LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON E.EMPNO = R.INWRITER_ID WHERE R.RSV_IDX = #{rsvIdx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEETROM_RSV ( RSV_IDX, MEET_GUBUN, RSV_DATE, SRT_TIME, END_TIME, EMPNO, TITLE, CONTENTS, AREA_CODE, REGI_DATE, INWRITER_ID ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(RSV_IDX), 0) + 1 FROM MEETROM_RSV), #{meetGubun}, TO_DATE(#{rsvDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{srtTime}, #{endTime}, #{empno}, #{title}, #{contents}, #{areaCode}, SYSDATE, #{empno} )
mapper.update: UPDATE MEETROM_RSV SET MEET_GUBUN = #{meetGubun}, RSV_DATE = TO_DATE(#{rsvDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), SRT_TIME = #{srtTime}, END_TIME = #{endTime}, TITLE = #{title}, CONTENTS = #{contents}, AREA_CODE = #{areaCode}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPWRITER_ID = #{empno} WHERE RSV_IDX = #{rsvIdx}
